mattress-encasement-general.tagline: Full 6-sided encasement  -  complete waterproof protection from all angles. TPU inner layer. OEKO-TEX certified.

mattress-encasement-general.tabDescriptionTitle: Complete Waterproof Protection from All Angles
mattress-encasement-general.tabDescriptionP: Unlike standard fitted protectors, the 6-Sided Mattress Encasement wraps your entire mattress  -  top, bottom, and all four sides  -  for complete protection against dust mites, allergens, bed bugs, and liquids from any direction.
tabDescriptionBullets: Full 6-sided encasement  -  no exposed surfaces
TPU inner layer  -  100% waterproof from all angles
12 inch / 30cm depth  -  fits most standard mattresses
Pure White only  -  clean and minimal
OEKO-TEX certified for safety
Ideal for allergy sufferers and asthma sufferers
mattress-encasement-general.tabFabricP: The TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane) inner layer provides 100% waterproof protection from all angles. Unlike noisy plastic covers, TPU is quiet and skin-safe while creating a complete moisture barrier.
tabCareBullets: Machine wash warm (40°C / 104°F)  -  gentle cycle
Do not bleach  -  mild detergent only
Tumble dry low or hang dry
Do not iron the TPU layer
Remove and re-install monthly for hygiene
